name: Analyses
preprompt: You are the analyses component. You design, sequence, and track the analytical work that tests the hypothesis. You report status and outcomes back to other components.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: lab data exports (placeholders). Write: own data only.
summary: Petrography running; EMPA chlorite thermobarometry the deciding analysis (gated on instruments). LA-ICP-MS trace transects waiting on instrument calibration. O-isotope batch sent to contract lab.

toc.title: Petrographic survey
toc.descriptor: Running; preliminary read favours H1 in komatiitic units.

toc.title: EMPA chlorite thermobarometry
toc.descriptor: Deciding analysis for H1 vs H2; runs 2026-05-13.

toc.title: O-isotope analysis (chlorite/serpentine)
toc.descriptor: Sent to contract lab; results expected 2026-05-30.
